_comment: Hand-labeled evaluation queries for nl_query_patients. Each entry has a natural-language question and the set of patient IDs that are the ground-truth relevant results. relevant_ids is a list of known-relevant patient IDs; any_of_relevant is the minimum number that must appear in the top-K for a hit to count (default 1). Use 'notes' to document why each patient is relevant.

queries.question: patients with type 2 diabetes
queries.notes: Populate with patient IDs that have ICD-10 E11.x or SNOMED 44054006

queries.question: patients on metformin
queries.notes: Populate with patient IDs that have metformin in patient_medications

queries.question: patients with hypertension on ACE inhibitors
queries.notes: Conditions include hypertension AND medications include ACE inhibitor drug class

queries.question: patients with elevated creatinine
queries.notes: patient_observations loinc 2160-0 (creatinine) with value > normal range

queries.question: female patients over 65 with osteoporosis
queries.notes: gender=female, age derived from birth_date, ICD-10 M81.x

queries.question: patients with asthma on corticosteroids
queries.notes: conditions include asthma AND medications include corticosteroid drug class

queries.question: patients with atrial fibrillation on anticoagulants
queries.notes: ICD-10 I48.x AND anticoagulant drug class

queries.question: patients with depression on SSRIs
queries.notes: ICD-10 F32.x/F33.x AND SSRI drug class

queries.question: patients with both diabetes and heart failure
queries.notes: Compound query: both conditions must be present

queries.question: patients with anxiety or depression
queries.notes: ICD-10 F40.x/F41.x or F32.x/F33.x — either condition qualifies
